---
title: "Heng-Hsieh Chang"
body-id: about-page
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
image: aboutme.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Jessica19940828
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/heng-hsieh-chang-849957233/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact Me
      href: mailto:hcha0190@student.monash.edu

---

Marketing professional with 6+ years driving market expansion and revenue growth. Currently advancing my analytical capabilities as a **Master of Business Analytics student at Monash University**, I bridge creative strategy with data-driven insights.

I specialize in transforming complex data into actionable strategies that integrate analytics, SEO/SEM, and storytelling to maximize ROI and strengthen client relationships.


---

### 💼 Professional Experience

**Brand Manager** | flyingV Crowdfunding Platform  
*2021 - 2024*

**Digital Marketer** | Taiwan Rakuten Ichiba  
*2019 - 2021*

--- 

### 🌱 Beyond Work
I enjoy exploring new cuisines, singing, and playing badminton. I believe creativity thrives where curiosity meets connection — both in data and in life.
